input.title: Microsoft misses cloud revenue targets; Azure growth slows
input.content: Microsoft Corp (MSFT) reported fiscal quarter results that missed consensus on Azure growth. Executives cited delayed enterprise deals and higher AI infrastructure costs. The company cut near-term cloud margin expectations.

mockModelResponse.headline: Microsoft cloud growth misses estimates
mockModelResponse.summary: Microsoft missed Azure growth expectations and trimmed near-term cloud margin outlook, pointing to delayed deals and AI costs.

meta.notes: Earnings miss with negative investor impact.
